items.title: Regularly $700 Cooler Master Sneaker X PC case with a 360mm liquid cooler and 850W PSU just plunged to $280 (60% off)
items.summary:
Over at Woot, as part of its wider sale on PC components, you can now find the updated version of Cooler Master’s Sneaker X PC case going for $279.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee applies otherwise). Be sure to enter promo code TWENTYOFFPC during checkout to see the discounted price. This is the latest configuration of the case, complete with Cooler Master’s pre-installed 360mm Flux liquid cooler and an 850W V850 SFX Gold ATX 3.0 power supply, that typically sells for around $700 at Amazon. While we’ve seen this model pop up with some notable discounts at Woot in recent months, today’s offer marks the lowest price we’ve tracked yet at a massive 60% off. It’s still pricier than your average PC case, but it delivers a great overall value at this discounted price – especially considering it comes with a 360mm liquid cooler and 850W PSU right out of the box. Head below for more details.

items.title: Ride1Up adds all three Find My-equipped VORSA modular multi-use e-bikes to its latest sale at lows from $1,395
items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Spring into Action Sale with up to $700 e-bike discounts, which we already saw add new lows on the Portola Compact Folding e-bike, Ride1Up has added all three variants of its VORSA Modular Multi-Use e-bikes to the lineup now. The VORSA Lite e-bike down at $1,395 shipped, while the standard VORSA e-bike is at $1,595 shipped, and the FT (Fat Tire) model is also down at $1,595 shipped. The standard and FT versions of this e-bike are down from $1,695 full prices, while the Lite model is dropping from a $1,495 price tag, which has consistently been the discount we’ve seen on them since getting their first savings back in August 2025, though it’s not regularly featured in sales like some of the other e-bikes under the brand’s flag. For the rest of this sale, you’re getting another shot at saving $100 at the lowest prices we have tracked.
